title: Kumara Bhikkhu
contentHtml:
Saṁyutta Index & Reference Number Conversion Table, by Kumara Bhikkhu (2012; 1p./34KB)
A table for easy conversion between traditional (DPR, CSCD) and modern (ATI, CDB) numbering systems of the Samyutta Nikaya. [Not available in HTML]
